name: Avanti
description_short: Avanti Destinations is a customized travel planning company specializing in bespoke vacation itineraries for independent travelers, not a consumer finance product.
description_long:
Avanti Destinations operates as a travel agency and tour operator focused on creating personalized vacation experiences for independent travelers (FITs - Fully Independent Travelers). The company positions itself as a leader in customized travel planning with expertise across multiple global destinations. Based on their website content, Avanti is entirely focused on travel services and does not offer any consumer financial products, credit services, loans, or financial assistance of any kind. The company markets itself through travel consultants, online booking portals, and destination management partnerships rather than financial products. Their service model centers on designing custom itineraries, curating travel experiences, and providing travel-specific support to agents and travelers. Avanti explicitly operates as a travel intermediary with no involvement in consumer finance, lending, credit services, or alternative financial products. The website makes no mention of loans, credit products, financial assistance, or any services remotely related to consumer finance. This company has been categorized incorrectly on CreditDoc and should be removed from the consumer finance platform entirely, as it serves an entirely different market segment focused exclusively on vacation planning and travel coordination.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. Credit union installment loans and CDFI products typically offer APRs well below payday rates, with structured repayment over several months.
services: International travel support and local contacts
Regional brochures and travel planning resources
Multiple destination expertise (Europe, Asia, South Pacific, etc.)
pros: Customized vacation design with handpicked products across multiple destinations
Global coverage including Europe, Asia, Central/South America, Africa, Middle East, and South Pacific
Multiple booking platforms including online portal and phone/email consultant support
Local destination support through partnerships with destination management companies
Pre- and post-cruise tour packages available
Knowledgeable travel consultants providing personalized assistance
cons: Limited call center hours (6am-5pm PT for most destinations, earlier for Europe)
Not a consumer finance company and should not be listed on CreditDoc
International travel focus may not serve domestic-only travelers
Requires agent partnership or direct customer navigation of online systems
No financial products or emergency lending capabilities
best_for: Independent travelers (FITs) seeking customized vacation itineraries
Travel agents booking complex multi-destination trips
Travelers seeking pre-arranged local support at international destinations
diagnosis: Avanti Destinations is a travel agency specializing in customized vacation planning, not a consumer finance company. This company provides zero consumer financial products and should be removed from CreditDoc entirely, as it operates in the travel industry with no connection to lending, credit services, or financial assistance.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
